Feeling pretty okey all things considered, I even did sauna in Frankfurt in Sofitel, damn that room was expensive but still it was worth it, and it was easy in and out with nice taxi, flight was withouth the socks this time and it was fine I was moving every 3 hours and sleeping and did. the exercises he told me to do, low pulse toda
4/10 on the plane but otherwise it was perfectly fine
